releaseNotes:
🎉 v1.1.0 — Project Restructuring & Shader Rewrite

## ✨ New Features
- Shader completely rewritten: new multi-wave mixing formula for smoother animations
- 5 shader themes: Dark, Ocean, Forest, Sunset, Lavender + custom colors
- Custom color pickers in Settings with DB persistence

## 🔧 Improvements
- Project restructuring: all inline JS/CSS extracted to separate component files
- All themes now have dark backgrounds for better color visibility
- Cleaner, more maintainable codebase

## 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Shader now properly reads saved theme on initialization
- Ring color simplified to pure white for all themes
